title: Pilkyung
description: Former assistant professor at Tohoku University. Scholar of condensed matter physics and nanoscience. Work has appeared in Nature, Science and Physical Review. Teaches physics at NYU Shanghai.
text:
Pilkyung Moon
Select Publications
"Strongly Hybridized Phonons in One-Dimensional van der Waals Crystals", Shaoqi Sun, Qingyun Lin, Yihuan Li, Daichi Kozawa, Huizhen Wu, Shigeo Maruyama, Pilkyung Moon, Toshikaze Kariyado, Ryo Kitaura, Sihan Zhao, Phys. Rev. Lett. 134, 176101 (2025)
"Synthetic Band Structure Engineering of Graphene Using Block Copolymer Templated Dielectric Superlattices", Moeid Jamalzadeh, Zihan Zhang, Zhujun Huang, Miguel Manzo-Perez, Kim Kisslinger, Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Pilkyung Moon, Gregory Doerk, Davood Shahrjerdi, ACS Nano 19, 9885 (2025)
"Nonlinear Landau Fan Diagram for Graphene Electrons Exposed to a Moiré Potential", Pilkyung Moon,* Youngwook Kim,* Mikito Koshino,* Takashi Taniguchi, Kenji Watanabe, Jurgen H. Smet, Nano Lett. 24, 3339 (2024) (Journal cover)
"Dirac electrons in a dodecagonal graphene quasicrystal", Sung Joon Ahn,* Pilkyung Moon,* Tae-Hoon Kim,* Hyun-Woo Kim, Ha-Chul Shin, Eun Hye Kim, Hyun Woo Cha, Se-Jong Kahng, Philip Kim, Mikito Koshino, Young-Woo Son,† Cheol-Woong Yang,† Joung Real Ahn†, Science 361, 782 (2018)
"Hofstadter’s butterfly in moiré superlattice: A fractal quantum Hall effect", C. R. Dean, L. Wang, P. Maher, C. Forsythe, F. Ghahari, Y. Gao, J. Katoch, M. Ishigami, P. Moon, M. Koshino, T. Taniguchi, K. Watanabe, K. L. Shepard, J. Hone, P. Kim, Nature 497, 598 (2013)
